title: OverAllPVP
description: Minecraft smoother and purple theme for PvP (recommended with CIT Resewn, Continuity or Fabulously Optimized)
body:
Here's my **PvP texture pack** _(purple theme)_

Change 100% of the game's textures to make them smoother with a purple theme for pvp

**You maybe need to UNZIP it and it's recommended with [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) and [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) / [Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized)**

![Crystal PvP](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3d8b63aea2d765bed27615e25382088979116e0d.png)

I'm also looking to make the texture pack compatible with mods like Appleskin or ModMenu, etc... (If you want to know if others become compatible, stay up to date with the latest news ;D)
